name: Bailey's Marbled Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted butter, sugar, and cocoa powder in a bowl.
2. Stir in the ground Graham cracker crumbs until evenly distributed.
3. Press the mixture evenly over the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Cool the pan and grease the sides.
5. In another bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth.
6. Gradually beat in the sugar until fully incorporated.
7. Beat in the eggs one at a time, ensuring each is fully mixed before adding the next.
8. Blend in the Bailey's Irish cream until well combined.
9. Pour about 1/3 of the mixture into a separate bowl and stir in the melted chocolate.
10. Pour half of the plain mixture into the prepared pan.
11. Drizzle with half the chocolate mixture.
12. Repeat layers by pouring the remaining plain mixture and the remaining chocolate mixture into the pan.
13. Gently swirl the batter with a knife to create a marbled design.
14. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes, then reduce the temperature to 250°F and bake for an additional 55 minutes.
